description: In “Prophecy,” Carissa Véliz explores how generative A.I. relies on prediction, enriching Big Tech while making the rest of us less safe.

raw_title: Book Review: “Japanese Gothic,” by Kylie Lee Baker
description: In “Japanese Gothic,” a 21st-century college student and a 19th-century samurai find themselves occupying the same house.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Aside From My Heart, All Is Well,’ by Héctor Abad
book_title: ‘Aside From My Heart, All Is Well,’ by Héctor Abad
description: The worldly men of the cloth in Héctor Abad’s new novel find divinity both inside and outside the church.
